g.onclick: sendPrompt('What file types should be supported for upload — PDF, JPG, PNG, DICOM?')
sendPrompt('Should encryption happen on the client device before upload, or server-side after upload?')
sendPrompt('How does Gemini handle image OCR — do we send base64 or a URL, what prompt works best?')
sendPrompt('What fields should be extracted from a lab report — test name, value, unit, reference range, date?')

svg.text: "Extract all medical data as JSON: tests, values, units, dates, doctor name, diagnosis, medications mentioned"

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of queries should the AI search handle — by date, by test type, by keyword?')
sendPrompt('Should we do keyword search on extracted text, or build a vector embedding index for semantic search?')
sendPrompt('What system prompt should Gemini get for medical summarisation — what constraints, what tone?')
sendPrompt('How should the AI response be displayed in the app — chat bubble, summary card, or inline in history?')
sendPrompt('When should diet/exercise suggestions be triggered — on demand, after a telemetry reading, weekly?')
sendPrompt('What profile context should be sent to Gemini for diet suggestions — conditions, allergies, medications, recent telemetry?')
sendPrompt('What safety disclaimer should accompany AI diet or exercise suggestions in a medical app?')
sendPrompt('Should diet suggestions be saved to the profile, or ephemeral each session?')
sendPrompt('Show me the exact Python code to call Gemini 2.0 Flash with a medical report image and extract structured JSON')
sendPrompt('What are the Gemini 2.0 Flash free tier limits — requests per minute, tokens per day?')
sendPrompt('How should the AIService class be structured in Python to abstract Gemini and allow swapping to another model later?')

svg.text: Rate limit strategy (15 req/min free tier)
OCR runs once at upload, result cached in ai_extracted_text — never re-called for same file
Search/summary: debounce user queries, queue requests, show loading state
Diet suggestions: generate weekly, cache result, regenerate only on profile change
Context assembly — what gets sent to Gemini

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How much telemetry history should be included in an AI query context — last 30 days, 90 days?')
sendPrompt('Should all medications and conditions be included in every AI query, or only relevant ones?')
sendPrompt('How should we select which medical files to include in context — most recent, most relevant, keyword matched?')
